name: 1-800-bizarre
description: A comprehensive web platform for the JoJo's Bizarre Adventure TTRPG

scripts.dev:backend: source .venv/bin/activate && cd backend/src && python manage.py runserver
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:backend: source .venv/bin/activate && cd backend/src && python manage.py test
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:frontend && npm run test:unit:backend
scripts.test:unit:backend: source .venv/bin/activate && cd backend/src && coverage run --source=characters manage.py test && coverage report --fail-under=70
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:frontend && npm run test:integration:backend
scripts.test:integration:backend: source .venv/bin/activate && cd backend/src && python manage.py test characters.tests.test_integration_business_flows
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install

author: Your Name
